description: Gene-family order coherence in candidate boundary flanks, computed against sister species by the cross_species_bridge.py script, which consumes the catfish-synteny-toolkit STEP_09c output. A flank with coherent gene order in another species confirms that the boundary is well-located; an incoherent flank on one side of a candidate suggests the boundary is mis-localized or the event is more complex than a simple inversion.
question: Q3

q3_left_flank_coherence_score.description: STEP_09c coherence score for the left flank, 0..1; higher = more gene-order preservation
